data.title: 3D printing materials market expected to reach $10.02 billion by 2030, according to MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on October 9, 2025, a report on the 3D Printing Materials Market was released. This report covers various types of materials including plastics, metals, ceramics, and others. The materials are available in forms such as filament, powder, and liquid. Different technologies like FDM, SLA, SLS, DMLS, and others are used in the market. The applications of these materials range from prototyping to manufacturing and other uses. The report delves into end-use sectors and explores the market trends and forecasts related to the 3D printing materials market.

data.title: Somnigroup International appoints Kindel Nuno as new General Counsel after serving as CHRO. NYSE: SGI.
data.description: In Dallas on October 9, 2025, Somnigroup International Inc. (NYSE: SGI) revealed the promotion of Kindel Nuno to the role of Chief Human Resources Officer and General Counsel. Nuno, previously the Chief Human Resources Officer at Somnigroup, now holds this dual leadership position within the company.

data.title: Wabash introduces Trailers as a Service, changing trailer accessibility for shippers and carriers through new programs.
data.description: Innovative Pools and Plus initiatives are revolutionizing the way shippers, third-party logistics providers (3PLs), and carriers acquire trailer capacity. These programs are introducing significant changes in the procurement process, enhancing efficiency and transparency in the industry. With the adoption of these initiatives, companies will experience a streamlined approach to securing trailer capacity, leading to improved operational processes and potentially reduced costs. This transformation underscores a groundbreaking shift in the traditional methods of acquiring transportation resources, reshaping the landscape for stakeholders across the supply chain.

data.title: Rail Vision to acquire 51% stake in Quantum Transportation, combining quantum & safety tech for synergies.
data.description: A strategic acquisition has been announced to acquire a majority stake of 51% in Quantum Transportation. This move aims to combine the quantum capabilities of Quantum Transportation with the safety technologies of Rail Vision. The merger is expected to create significant synergies between the two companies.

data.title: Helen of Troy Limited's Q2 fiscal 2026: Net sales $431.8m vs. $474.2m in fiscal 2025, profit margin down to 44.2%.
data.description: Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE), a global company specializing in branded consumer products for home, outdoors, beauty, and wellness, has released its financial results for the three-month period ending August 31, 2025. In the second quarter of fiscal 2026, the company reported consolidated net sales revenue of $431.8 million, a decrease from $474.2 million in fiscal 2025. The gross profit margin was 44.2%, down from 45.6% in the previous year. The operating margin stood at (73.1)%, factoring in certain pre-transaction costs.

data.title: BD enrolls first patient in XTRACT™ Registry to advance insights in peripheral artery disease.
data.description: Today, in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) revealed that the XTRACT™ Registry has commenced with the enrollment of the initial patient. This registry is a single-arm, post-market registry study conducted at multiple centers, aiming to track and gather data on the performance of medical technology. The company is a prominent player in the medical technology sector, listed on the NYSE under the symbol BDX.

data.title: Global edge security market to grow to $136.5 billion by 2034 at 20.1% CAGR, driven by SASE adoption and 5G networks.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon on October 9, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide edge security market is rapidly expanding as a result of the increasing adoption of secure access service edge (SASE) and the growing prevalence of 5G networks. The rise in remote and hybrid work environments is also fueling this market growth.
